reviews.review_description: When u try to move it won’t let me, I was pressing everything on my controllers and nothing worked

Play this regularly whilst the kettle boils on work breaks. Got that one more go vibe, nice physics.

Now for the improvement list:
It's not clear how many lives you have,can't see it represented anywhere ( it's 3! )
Nice to have modifiers to save what obstacle types you would like to encounter 
Quest 3 enhancements, anti-aliasing and a resolution boost please.
MR mode, though due to colour scheme, some tweaking be needed to see shrukiens.
